name: FACIS Weather
info:
FACIS Simulation — Weather subflow

Generates a WeatherReading for a given (entity_id, timestamp_ms) using
the same daily/seasonal/diurnal cycles as `src/simulators/weather/`.
Uses seedrandom.alea seeded via SHA-256 (mirrors `rng.subflow.json`).

Input msg.payload:
  base_seed, entity_id, timestamp_ms, timestamp (ISO), site_id
  optional config: { latitude, longitude, base_temperature_summer_c, ... }

Output msg.payload (WeatherReading):
  { site_id, timestamp, location, conditions: { temperature_c, humidity_percent,
    wind_speed_ms, wind_direction_deg, cloud_cover_percent,
    ghi_w_m2, dni_w_m2, dhi_w_m2 } }

Physics is duplicated in tests/flows/weather.spec.js — keep in sync.

name: weather compute
